x-artifact.note: Design-first artifact only — describes the MCP tool surface, not a running server. Tool input/output schemas $ref the same object schemas as the OpenAPI; each tool maps to an OpenAPI operationId so the REST and agent contracts stay in lockstep.

server.name: io.nyc.schools
server.title: NYC Public Schools
server.description: Agent-native access to NYC Public Schools — school directory, demographics, test results, calendar, and enrollment applications. Unifies data split today between schools.nyc.gov (JS pages + vendor search), an internal /CustomApi, and NYC Open Data; adds the net-new enrollment-application workflow.
server.instructions: Use find_schools / get_school to locate schools (DBN is the key). get_school_demographics and get_school_test_results add detail. find_calendar_events answers school-year date questions. Enrollment tools (submit/get/list_enrollment_application) require an authenticated guardian (NYC Schools Account) and mutate state — confirm details with the user before submitting.

tools.name: find_schools
tools.title: Find Schools
tools.description: Search NYC public schools by borough, district, school type, grade, and/or free text. Owned replacement for the HawkSearch-powered Find-a-School.

tools.name: get_school
tools.title: Get School
tools.description: Fetch a single school by DBN (District-Borough-Number, e.g. 15K261).

tools.name: get_school_demographics
tools.title: Get School Demographics
tools.description: Get demographic snapshots (enrollment by grade/race/gender/poverty/ELL/SWD, ENI) for a school, optionally by year.

tools.name: get_school_test_results
tools.title: Get School Test Results
tools.description: Get school-level assessment results (SAT, AP, Regents, SHSAT) for a school.

tools.name: find_calendar_events
tools.title: Find Calendar Events
tools.description: Look up NYC public schools calendar events (holidays, recesses, no-school days) by school year and/or date range.

tools.name: submit_enrollment_application
tools.title: Submit Enrollment Application
tools.description: Submit a new NYC schools admissions/enrollment application (3K, PreK, K, G&T, Middle, High School, Specialized). NET-NEW workflow (MySchools) with no equivalent today. Requires an authenticated guardian. Mutates state — confirm details with the user first.

tools.name: check_application_status
tools.title: Check Application Status
tools.description: Fetch the status and offer of an enrollment application by id (draft, submitted, offer-made, waitlisted, not-matched...).

tools.name: list_enrollment_applications
tools.title: List My Enrollment Applications
tools.description: List the authenticated guardian's enrollment applications, optionally filtered by status or admissions process.

tools.name: update_enrollment_application
tools.title: Update Enrollment Application
tools.description: Update or withdraw a draft/submitted application (e.g. re-rank school choices). Requires an authenticated guardian. Mutates state — confirm with the user first.
